prompt: This method should print all elements except the last, but it skips the first one instead. What is the bug?
choices: i < arr.length should be i <= arr.length
The loop starts at i=1 instead of i=0, skipping the first element; to exclude the last, start at 0 and use i < arr.length - 1
printAllButLast should use a while loop instead of for
arr[i] should be arr[i-1] to offset the index
explanation: Starting at i=1 skips arr[0]. To print all but the last, the loop should start at 0 and stop before the last element: for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++).
